summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of React proposal presentation system for WTF Agency. All core functionality working correctly with dynamic routing, client-specific theming, and interactive components.
passed_tests: Root path redirect to /wine works correctly
Invalid routes properly redirect to 404 error page
ProposalHeader displays correct client names and WTF branding
HeroSection shows client-specific content with proper accent colors
Client-specific accent colors working: wine (burgundy #722F37), honda (red #D62626), census (blue #2563EB)
PricingTable displays 3 tiers with recommended badge on middle tier
Timeline expandable phases functionality working (click to expand)
ContactSection Accept Proposal and Schedule Discussion buttons present
Navigation links scroll to sections (Overview, Pricing, Timeline, Contact)
Mobile menu toggle and navigation working correctly
404 page shows available proposals with functional navigation buttons
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Responsive design working on mobile and desktop viewports
Smooth animations and interactions throughout the application
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (15/15 major features working, 1 minor selector issue)
